message:
fix: compilation error and minor cleanup in v0.3.0

- Add missing burst_min_confidence field to integration test's
  PredictiveConfig constructor
- Fix unused variable warning in decision_plane_e2e test
- Reorder burst threshold guard condition for clarity and add
  documentation about stale counter prevention at negligible rates
